ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the monitoring point */,
  "available_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was made available */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date and time for which the prediction is made */,
  "wind_speed_100m" REAL /* Wind speed measured at 100m altitude */,
  "wind_direction_100m" REAL /* Wind direction measured at 100m altitude */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Air temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "air_density" REAL /* Air density in kg/m^3 */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation amount in mm */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Wind gust speed in m/s */,
  "radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation in W/m^2 */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at ground level in m/s */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction at ground level in degrees */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the forecasting model */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, satellite, manual input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id", "available_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monitoring_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring point */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location of the monitoring point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the monitoring point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the monitoring point */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the monitoring point in meters */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the monitoring point was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance or calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the monitoring point (e.g., active, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the monitoring point */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name or ID of the organization or individual responsible for the monitoring point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's methodology */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "training_data_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training data used to build the model */,
  "training_data_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training data used to build the model */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the user who created the model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the model is currently in use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for emergency contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring point being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data or resources accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("point_id") REFERENCES monitoring_points ("point_id")
)
